rationale: Educ. Code §12.135 governs charter district bond guarantees through the permanent school fund. It has no relation to residence homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal values under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 12.135. DESIGNATION AS CHARTER DISTRICT FOR PURPOSES OF BOND GUARANTEE.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule concerns charter school bond guarantees and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
